introSection: Flying Viking is a steel roller coaster located at Adventureland in Altoona, Iowa, USA. It opened on June 24, 2023 along with Draken Falls, a log flume. Draken Falls and Flying Viking were both supplied by Italian manufacturer Zamperla and the track of the two rides intertwine.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders per train.

fullText:
Flying Viking is a steel roller coaster located at Adventureland in Altoona, Iowa, USA. It opened on June 24, 2023 along with Draken Falls, a log flume. Draken Falls and Flying Viking were both supplied by Italian manufacturer Zamperla and the track of the two rides intertwine.



6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 12 riders per train.
